matchedCandidate.identityEvidence: The requested record is genus-level Pouteria sp.; the Brazilian Forest Service LPF page explicitly identifies this specimen as Pouteria sp. and captions the image Corte tangencial.
matchedCandidate.visualCheckNotes: Opened at original resolution. A continuous exposed longitudinal wood face fills the image and shows natural grain; no tree, foliage, bark, furniture, generic texture, diagram, or microscopy is present.
matchedCandidate.creator: Serviço Florestal Brasileiro, Laboratório de Produtos Florestais (LPF/SFB)
